name: cso-framework
description: Production-grade agent coordination system. Plan, execute, validate, and ship with clarity and accountability.
author: CSO Team

skills.name: task-breakdown
skills.description: Break complex objectives into atomic, executable tasks.

skills.name: incremental-implementation
skills.description: Execute tasks one at a time, test-driven.

skills.name: code-review-and-quality
skills.description: Review code for bugs, consistency, and quality.

skills.name: output-compression
skills.description: Compress skill outputs and persona reports using Headroom (60-95% token savings).

agents.name: orchestrator
agents.description: Chief of Staff coordinator. Routes work, owns outcomes.

agents.name: engineer
agents.description: Technical builder. Executes tasks with tests.

agents.name: test-engineer
agents.description: Validation specialist. Owns proof and coverage.

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Quality gate keeper. Owns merge approval.

agents.name: ops
agents.description: Status keeper. Tracks progress, surfaces blockers.

agents.name: release-engineer
agents.description: Shipping specialist. Owns deployment and launch.

tools.name: headroom_compress
tools.description: Compress content using Headroom (60-95% token reduction)

tools.name: headroom_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve original cached content from compression

tools.name: headroom_stats
tools.description: Get compression statistics and cache metrics

hooks.onActivate: Initialize Chief of Staff framework + Headroom compression
